signin.headline: Multi-model tax analysis,
signin.bodyPrefix: TaxAiPro runs multiple models in parallel, crosschecks where they agree and disagree, then rewrites
signin.bodySuffix: with explicit assumptions, caveats, and missing facts.
signin.ctaHint: Create your account once, then log in anytime.

signin.disclaimer: Drafts for triage only — not legal or tax advice.
